prompt: A high-quality studio portrait of a young woman with stylishly voluminously dark hair styled in soft, layered waves — the hair has a deep side-swept part, full-bodied volume at the crown, and loose waves cascading past the shoulders with soft face-framing layers around the cheeks. She is sitting on a white floor in a relaxed pose with her left knee raised and her arm resting on it. She is wearing a white and purple patterned flannel shirt with the sleeves slightly rolled up, black jeans, and purple-and-white sneakers. She accessorizes with a black wristwatch and simple black rings. She is looking directly at the camera with a calm, confident expression. The background is a solid purple wall featuring elegant white floral stencil art. To her right (viewer's left) stands a white, fluted classic column decorated with delicate purple blossoms. The foreground floor is scattered with fresh purple and white flowers. Soft, even studio lighting. Keep original face and hairstyle 100% reference. Ratio 9:16
